guide_pink_fabric_under_presser_foot.query: a worker feeds the edge of pink fabric under the sewing machine presser foot while guiding it with both hands

remove_pink_fabric_from_sewing_machine.query: a worker pulls pink fabric away from the sewing machine needle area and moves it aside

spread_and_align_pink_fabric_edges.query: a worker spreads a piece of pink fabric with both hands and follows its edge with their fingers to align the overlapping edges
